mainspring master @ fa03ca7
Source: mainspring/platform/services/bias_audit.py
Vendored (ORM-free only): GroupMetrics, BiasAuditResult, the constants
(AUDIT_GROUP_FIELD, MAX_PARITY_GAP, MAX_ODDS_GAP, MIN_GROUP_N) — copied verbatim —
plus a thin seam (evaluate_demographic_parity / GroupRate / BiasAuditor) lifting
mainspring's audit() demographic-parity verdict out of its DB session so the
shadow needs no mainspring Case/PolicyVersion/Session.
NOT vendored: audit() / _load_fitted() / _audit_group() / _expected_label() —
they import sqlalchemy Session + Case + PolicyVersion and run select(Case) (NOT
ORM-free); the equalized_odds branch (needs labelled cases loaded from the DB).
Re-vendor: bash backend/scripts/vendor_mainspring_bias.sh
